name_en: 🌷With full original red box packaging🌷【New Arrival】From mirror leather to sparkling crystals and elegant velvet, Gucci celebrates the gift-giving season with a variety of items. Choose from the brand's curated iconic handbags to inject a touch of vitality into your entire look.
name_cn:
🌷With full original red box packaging🌷【New Arrival】From mirror leather to sparkling crystals and elegant velvet, Gucci celebrates the gift-giving season with a variety of items. Choose from the brand's curated iconic handbags to inject a touch of vitality into your entire look.
Gold metallic leather
Vintage shiny palladium gold hardware
Red cotton-linen lining
Double G
The slide chain strap can be used as a shoulder strap (55cm length) or top handle (30cm height). It can also be used as a crossbody bag.
Spring buckle flap
Weight: approx. 0.6kg
Model: 446744.
Size: 22cm(W) x 13cm(H) x 6cm(D).
Color: Gold leather/Original leather.
Italian creation
